headline: Cardinal Health Targets Community Sites With Advanced Therapies And Partnerships
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) has released its 2026 Advanced Therapies Report. The report highlights a shift toward administering advanced therapies in community and outpatient settings. It emphasizes expanding patient access, the role of partnerships, and the need for infrastructure development. For Cardinal Health, known for its role in pharmaceutical distribution and healthcare services, this report places advanced therapies at the center of its conversation with providers and stakeholders...
